observed_result: third_try locks xlm-roberta-base as the starting point; first_try was exploratory
diagnostic_use: Controls the starting point so tokenizer gains are not confused with a different pretrained base
main_claim_boundary: Only third_try XLM-R-base branch can support the main claim

observed_result: 48k gives best third_try tokenization average; second_try 8k improves raw loss over 32k but remains worse than original control
diagnostic_use: Shows vocab budget affects appended-token learning and fragmentation differently
main_claim_boundary: Vocab-size probes are ablations, not standalone positive model claims

observed_result: byte fallback is slightly better in tokenization metrics but has append-only implementation mismatch
diagnostic_use: Explains fallback as a tokenizer-axis diagnostic rather than a replacement model
main_claim_boundary: Byte fallback cannot be reported as main until tokenizer implementation can execute byte fallback directly

observed_result: fvt has best zero-step loss in third_try; second_try mean/align full-budget probes fail to beat fvt
diagnostic_use: Supports fvt as current selection and weakens the explanation that failure is only mean/align init
main_claim_boundary: Init ablation supports selection, not downstream success

third_try_main_value: Glot500-style full MLM intended; 200-step pilot plus replay-safe 1000-step retry executed
observed_result: third_try replay-safe retry improves the 200-step pilot but remains compute-bounded; second_try longer budget alone did not rescue normalized competitiveness
diagnostic_use: Separates compute limitation from evidence that budget alone may not solve appended-token failure

observed_result: checkpoint-150 is worse than checkpoint-200 on target10 MLM proxy and high-resource control proxy
diagnostic_use: Shows retained early checkpoint selection does not rescue the current candidate
main_claim_boundary: Only retained checkpoints are covered; checkpoint-50/100 were not saved

third_try_main_value: high-resource replay + target10 mixture with replay-safe lower-LR retry
observed_result: third_try replay-safe retry reduces but does not remove high-resource control degradation; second_try target-only branch fails original-control competitiveness
diagnostic_use: Indicates replay schedule/ratio is a live failure axis
main_claim_boundary: Replay ablation cannot be described as high-resource-safe yet

third_try_main_value: append-only new rows trained by full MLM
ablation_values: added-token failure analysis, new-row repair, staged repair
observed_result: second_try added-token loss is much higher than base-token loss; repairs are partial or fail gates
diagnostic_use: Provides the strongest mechanistic explanation for tokenizer gains not becoming model gains
main_claim_boundary: Repair probes are failure analysis, not main evidence

observed_result: Coptic POS token accuracy is weakly positive but macro F1 is negative; frozen proxy is mixed; first_try translation remains negative or retrieval-dominated
diagnostic_use: Prevents conflating tokenizer/representation gains with solved downstream generation
main_claim_boundary: Only locked target10 downstream seed-stable evidence can support positive claim

ablation_values: ByT5 direct NMT, pivot, retrieval-edit gates
observed_result: direct/pivot neural generation collapses or copies retrieval; source-only control collapses
diagnostic_use: Shows why translation runs are diagnostics rather than main encoder evidence
main_claim_boundary: Translation evidence cannot replace XLM-R encoder downstream evaluation

third_try_main_value: locked dev/test protocol and final-read audit
ablation_values: invalidated v1 translation shortcut; v2 ACT final protection
observed_result: v1 shortcut is invalidated; v2 no-final audit passes
diagnostic_use: Protects the negative diagnostic from being based on shortcut-prone positives
main_claim_boundary: Shortcut-prone first_try evidence must not be promoted to main

third_try_main_value: Coptic official-style supervised task plus proxies
ablation_values: missing official supervised tasks for other target10 languages
observed_result: only Coptic POS is locally confirmed; Syriac remains proxy-only in this protocol
diagnostic_use: Explains why positive target10 downstream claim is blocked
main_claim_boundary: Task coverage limitation must stay in the main report
